articles.description: The newly elected MPs represent Assam, Bihar, Haryana, Chhattisgarh, Himachal Pradesh, Telangana, Odisha and Maharashtra.

topStories.title: Understanding the delimitation exercise | Explained
topStories.description: What does delimitation mean and what are the constitutional provisions which deal with it? Why were the seats frozen as per the 1971 Census? Will the fresh exercise go against the federal principle, giving an advantage to certain States over others?

topStories.title: US military kills three in new Eastern Pacific boat strike
topStories.description: The attack is the latest in a string of killings by the United States that rights groups say are 'unlawful'.

topStories.title: Rajiv Gandhi pushed for 33% quota for women in panchayats, says Congress leader
topStories.description: BJP MP Harsh V Shringla said that the implementation of women's reservation was part of the vision of Prime Minister Narendra Modi for women-led development.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 48 of the US-Iran conflict?
topStories.description: US–Iran talks gain pace as Pakistan mediates, optimism for a new round of talks in Islamabad.

topStories.title: Iran-Linked Ships Take New Path To Trickle Into the Persian Gulf
topStories.description: At least two US-sanctioned, Iran-linked vessels made their way through the Strait of Hormuz and into the Persian Gulf on Thursday, taking what may be a new route from the United Arab Emirates even as a US blockade enters its third day.

topStories.title: In 2025 verdict, Supreme Court had warned of delimitation ‘destabilising uniform electoral framework’
topStories.description: The Supreme Court has consistently held that though judicial review of delimitation was limited, the court could intervene if the exercise was capricious and unreasonable

topStories.description: Far too many world leaders have chosen to mollify the bullying US president. Pope Leo has shown there's another way.

topStories.title: Trump says US pushing ‘historic’ Israel-Lebanon talks after 34 years, ‘trying to get a little breathing room’
topStories.description: The announcement signals a potential diplomatic breakthrough in a region marked by an increase in hostility and intermittent conflict between Israel and Lebanon.

topStories.title: Trump plans 250-foot ‘Triumphal Arch’ to mark 250 years of US independence
topStories.description: The Trump administration has unveiled plans for a huge structure to mark 250 years since the US declared independence.

topStories.description: US president says the leaders of the two countries will speak for the first time in 34 years on Thursday.

topStories.description: Pakistani sources say there has been a 'major breakthrough' over a deal on Iran’s nuclear programme.

dailyNews.title: Crude oil hovers below $95 amid Iran war peace talks. What to expect next?
dailyNews.description: Oil prices stayed below $95 as hopes of a US-Iran deal cooled supply concerns, with near-term direction hinging on progress in geopolitical talks and actual restoration of supply flows.

dailyNews.title: Court convicts Congress MLA in 2016 murder case in Karnataka
dailyNews.description: Congress MLA Vinay Kulkarni and 18 others were convicted in the 2016 murder of BJP leader Yogesh Gowda, concluding a lengthy investigation.

dailyNews.title: Cong suspends Abdul Jabbar amid internal rift after bypoll
dailyNews.description: Congress suspended MLC K Abdul Jabbar for alleged anti-party activities related to the Davanagere South by-election and ticket disputes.

dailyNews.title: NY Times reporter loses job over hot tub photos, NFL coach does not: Same old double-standard story
dailyNews.description: Newly-surfaced photos of NFL reporter Dianna Russini and Patriots coach Mike Vrabel raise questions about journalistic ethics and a painful double standard.

dailyNews.title: 2 detained after shooting in New York leaves 15-year-old killed, two others wounded: police
dailyNews.description: A gang-related shooting on Long Island in New York killed a 15-year-old boy and wounded two others after an argument at a barbeque, police said Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin decries CA governor front-runner Tom Steyer, claims he ‘doesn’t understand’ ICE
dailyNews.description: DHS Secretary Mullin accuses California gubernatorial candidate Tom Steyer of not understanding ICE after Steyer called the agency criminal.

dailyNews.title: Pandemonium: Pro Wrestling kickstarts WrestleMania week with hard-hitting action in Las Vegas
dailyNews.description: Indie promotion Pandemonium: Pro Wrestling kicked off WrestleMania week in Las Vegas with an intimate, action-packed event at the Bizarre Bar venue.

dailyNews.title: Iran to execute first female protester tied to anti-regime unrest
dailyNews.description: Iran prepares to execute its first female protester tied to the 2026 Tehran uprising as human rights groups warn of a deepening crackdown.

dailyNews.title: Guards at 'Alligator Alcatraz' beat, pepper-sprayed detainees, lawyer says
dailyNews.description: Guards beat and pepper-sprayed migrant detainees at "Alligator Alcatraz," causing injuries to their heads, shoulders and wrists, a lawyer for two detainees said.

dailyNews.title: LIV Golf CEO sends rallying memo to staff after reports Saudi funding could end after this season
dailyNews.description: In response to reports that Saudi Arabia will stop funding LIV Golf after 2026, CEO Scott O'Neil sent a memo rallying staff to embrace the moment and push on.

dailyNews.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani calls threat of rich people leaving NYC over taxes 'imagined'
dailyNews.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani claimed the threat of wealthy residents fleeing over higher taxes is imagined in contrast to past comments by New York Gov. Kathy Hochul.

dailyNews.title: Starbucks uses ChatGPT to suggest drinks based on mood as expert warns of hidden downsides
dailyNews.description: Starbucks is testing a ChatGPT beta app that helps customers choose beverages based on mood, taste and goals before ordering through the Starbucks app.

topStories.title: Elizabeth Banks admits she cannot understand White women who voted for Trump over Harris
topStories.description: Elizabeth Banks criticized White women who backed Trump, says she doesn’t understand them and urges women to be “revolutionaries" like her “Hunger Games" character.

topStories.title: Trump’s Portrayal of the War in Iran Collides With Reality
topStories.description: President Trump is confronting a crisis that is not bending to his narrative of a “pretty reasonable” new regime in Iran and all-but-assured victory for the United States.

topStories.title: Trump Breaks With Meloni, Italy’s Leader, Amid Dispute Over Pope and Iran
topStories.description: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was once considered one of President Trump’s closest European allies. Their friendship now appears in danger.

topStories.title: How Trump’s Clash With Pope Leo Turned Into a Fight Over Theology
topStories.description: When President Trump and G.O.P. leaders denounced the pope’s comments about the U.S. attack on Iran, they touched off a religious debate over what is and isn’t a “just war.”

topStories.title: Trump’s ‘Triumphal Arch’ Draws Backlash, Even From an Expert Who Proposed It
topStories.description: The story of how President Trump quadrupled the size of the original proposal for the arch follows a now-familiar pattern.

topStories.title: Trump says Iran war "close to over" amid push for new peace talks
topStories.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

topStories.title: 3 killed in latest U.S. strike on alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific, Pentagon says
topStories.description: President Trump has said the U.S. is in "armed conflict" with cartels in Latin America and has justified the attacks as a necessary escalation to stem the flow of drugs into the U.S.

topStories.title: Gabbard sends criminal referrals to DOJ for 2 officials linked to Trump impeachment
topStories.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has sent criminal referrals to the Justice Department related to a government watchdog and a whistleblower whose complaint helped trigger President Trump's first impeachment.

dailyNews.title: What we know as Trump says China agreed not to send weapons to Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Wednesday that China has agreed not to send weapons to Iran. Phelim Kine, the China and Indo-Pacific Affairs correspondent at Politico, joins "The Daily Report" with more.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon leaders to hold talks after first high-level meeting in decades
dailyNews.description: The U.S. president said he was "trying to get a little breathing room between Israel and Lebanon."

dailyNews.title: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
dailyNews.description: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.

dailyNews.title: White House budget chief Russell Vought won't estimate Iran war cost in testimony
dailyNews.description: Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought testified before the House Budget Committee on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent is preparing banks to collect citizenship data
dailyNews.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says the Trump administration expects banks to comply in collecting citizenship information from customers.

dailyNews.title: Thom Tillis opens up on which Cabinet secretaries are giving Trump bad advice
dailyNews.description: Sen. Thom Tillis (R-N.C.) sits down exclusively with NBC News' Julie Tsirkin to discuss how he views President Trump’s strategy on Iran, the midterms and his choice to retire from Congress.

dailyNews.title: Senate Republicans again block Democratic effort to end Trump's Iran war
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — Senate Republicans voted down a resolution Wednesday pushed by Democrats to prohibit President Donald Trump from taking further military action in Iran

dailyNews.title: White House and DOJ separation changes under Trump
dailyNews.description: NBC News' Laura Jarrett stops by "Here's the Scoop" to discuss her interview with acting Attorney General Todd Blanche and how he sees the future of the Justice Department.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo says world 'needs to hear' a message of peace
dailyNews.description: NBC News’ Claudio Lavanga shares an update from the pope’s trip to Africa, as the leader of the Catholic Church has been the target of recent Truth Social posts from President Trump.

dailyNews.title: White House holds press briefing
dailyNews.description: Watch live coverage as White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt holds a press briefing.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
